case_title: SAN FRANCISCO TENNIS CLUB VS SILVERSTEIN CYNTHIA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,103.46 FILED BY SAN FRANCISCO TENNIS CLUB AS TO DEFENDANT SILVERSTEIN CYNTHIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-16-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 00
